title: Butterfly Top Laser Favour Boxes! Wedding Filigree Cut Large Premium[Silver,10 Boxes]
features: These premium favour boxes feature intricate patterns cut with a laser.
Made from high quality pearlescent card.
With a dozen colours to choose from, these boxes will help add a touch of class to any wedding.
Rather large In size stading at 11cm overall and 6cm in width.
